summary: Tested multi-pet sync and WebSocket notification flow. Backend APIs working correctly: POST /api/mira/concierge-pick/ticket creates tickets with proper ticket_id format (TKT-*), GET /api/member/notifications/inbox returns notifications with unread count. Frontend localStorage sync working for selectedPetId. CuratedConciergeSection renders with data-testid and CTAs. However, CTA ✓ Received state not showing due to onTicketCreate override in CelebratePage.jsx.

ui_bugs.issue: CTA button does not show ✓ Received state after click. The onTicketCreate callback in CelebratePage.jsx (line 510) calls /api/service-requests instead of /api/mira/concierge-pick/ticket, bypassing the optimistic state update in CuratedConciergeSection.jsx

integration_issues.issue: Parent callback (onTicketCreate) overrides default behavior, preventing createdTickets state update and WebSocket integration

action_items: Fix CelebratePage.jsx line 510-541: Either remove onTicketCreate callback to use default behavior from CuratedConciergeSection, OR update the callback to call /api/mira/concierge-pick/ticket and return the result to enable state update
Ensure the onTicketCreate callback returns ticket data (ticket_id) so CuratedConciergeSection can update createdTickets state
critical_code_review_comments: CelebratePage.jsx: onTicketCreate callback (line 510-541) calls wrong endpoint (/api/service-requests) and doesn't return ticket_id, preventing optimistic UI update
The same issue may exist in other pages using CuratedConciergeSection with custom onTicketCreate handlers

success_rate.frontend: 80% - All features verified except CTA state change

seed_data_creation: Test tickets created during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend WebSocket emission code verified in mira_routes.py lines 24726-24754. CuratedConciergeSection works correctly when not overridden. The issue is in parent component callbacks. Check if DinePage.jsx has similar issues.

backend.POST /api/mira/concierge-pick/ticket: ✓ Creates ticket with TKT-* format, returns ticket_id
backend.GET /api/member/notifications/inbox/{ema: ✓ Returns notifications with unread count, supports pet_id and category filters
backend.WebSocket emission code: ✓ Verified in mira_routes.py - emit_ticket_created_to_member() and emit_inbox_badge_update() are called

frontend.localStorage.selectedPetId sync: ✓ Set correctly when pet is selected in navbar/dashboard
frontend.NotificationsInbox: ✓ Shows 53 unread notifications, displays ticket notifications correctly
frontend.MemberDashboard pet selector: ✓ Shows all pets with selection buttons
frontend.CuratedConciergeSection: ✓ Renders with data-testid, shows 'Handpicked for {petName}', 5 concierge cards/CTAs
frontend.CTA ✓ Received state: ✗ Not working due to onTicketCreate override in CelebratePage.jsx
